description.zh: 自动化系统、产线、执行器、控制柜和工程现场
description.en: Automation systems, production lines, actuators, control cabinets and factory sites

description.zh: 半导体设备、芯片、GPU、封装、测试和工艺对象
description.en: Semiconductor tools, chips, GPUs, packaging, testing and process objects

description.zh: 机器人、仿真、传感器、运动控制和真实部署
description.en: Robots, simulation, sensors, motion control and real-world deployment

description.zh: 电池、电源、储能、电机、逆变器和能源系统
description.en: Batteries, power supplies, storage, motors, inverters and energy systems

description.zh: SMT、装配、测试、工厂流程和质量控制
description.en: SMT, assembly, testing, factory workflow and quality control

description.zh: 嵌入式、性能、实时系统和工程软件基础
description.en: Embedded software, performance, real-time systems and engineering code foundations

description.zh: 脚本、数据处理、自动化、实验记录和小工具
description.en: Scripts, data processing, automation, lab notes and small tools

description.zh: 命令行、系统环境、设备调试和服务器基础
description.en: Command line, system environments, device debugging and server basics

description.zh: 版本控制、协作、资料维护和工程记录
description.en: Version control, collaboration, resource maintenance and engineering records

description.zh: 工业控制、I/O、梯形图、现场总线和产线逻辑
description.en: Industrial control, I/O, ladder logic, field buses and production-line logic

description.zh: MCU、固件、外设、实时控制和硬件接口
description.en: MCUs, firmware, peripherals, real-time control and hardware interfaces

description.zh: 传感器、采样、标定、噪声和数据读数
description.en: Sensors, sampling, calibration, noise and data readings

description.zh: 三角函数、微积分、线性代数、概率和傅里叶入口
description.en: Trigonometry, calculus, linear algebra, probability and Fourier intuition

description.zh: 力学、能量、转动、振动和工程对象直觉
description.en: Mechanics, energy, rotation, vibration and physical intuition

description.zh: 电压电流、电路、半导体、电源和 PCB
description.en: Voltage, current, circuits, semiconductors, power and PCBs

description.zh: 编程概念、数据结构、调试和工程代码阅读
description.en: Programming concepts, data structures, debugging and engineering code reading

description.zh: PID、反馈、稳定性、频响和运动控制
description.en: PID, feedback, stability, frequency response and motion control

description.zh: 测量、误差、仪器、采样、校准和实验判断
description.en: Measurement, error, instruments, sampling, calibration and experiment judgment
